user.title: Configure Peak Monitor
user.description: Set up power tariff monitoring for Swedish electricity pricing

data.only_one_peak_per_day: Only count one peak per day

data_description.consumption_sensor: Select the sensor that measures hourly power consumption
data_description.number_of_peaks: How many monthly peaks to track for tariff calculation
data_description.only_one_peak_per_day: When enabled, only the highest reading per day is recorded as a peak
data_description.price_per_kw: Price per kW used for cost calculations
data_description.fixed_monthly_fee: Fixed monthly network fee added to cost calculations
data_description.active_months: Months during which the tariff is active
data_description.sensor_resets_every_hour: Enable if your consumption sensor resets to 0 every hour. Disable if it is cumulative

data_description.active_start_hour: Hour when tariff monitoring starts on weekdays (0–23)
data_description.active_end_hour: Hour when tariff monitoring ends on weekdays (0–23). Same as start = 24-hour monitoring

data_description.weekend_behavior: How the tariff behaves on Saturdays and Sundays
data_description.weekend_start_hour: Hour when weekend tariff behaviour starts (default 6). Same as end = full day
data_description.weekend_end_hour: Hour when weekend tariff behaviour ends (default 21). Same as start = full day

data_description.holiday_behavior: How the tariff behaves on holidays
data_description.holidays: Select which holidays and holiday evenings should trigger the holiday behaviour

data_description.daily_reduced_tariff_enabled: Enable a daily period with reduced tariff weighting
data_description.reduced_start_hour: Start of the reduced tariff period
data_description.reduced_end_hour: End of the reduced tariff period

data_description.estimation_sensor: Optional: External sensor for consumption estimation. Leave empty to use built-in estimation
data_description.external_reduced_sensor: Optional binary sensor. When ON, activates reduced tariff mode
data_description.external_mute_sensor: Optional binary sensor. When ON, mutes the tariff completely
data_description.reset_value: Value the sensor resets to at the start of each month
data_description.output_unit: Unit used for output sensor values (W = Watt, kW = Kilowatt)
data_description.reduced_factor: Factor applied to consumption during reduced tariff periods (0.01–1.0, default 0.5)
